messages.content:
翻译with the continuous development of digital circuit technology, 
fieldbus technology and communication technology 
promote the development of temperature and humidity 
detection technology towards the direction of remote 
automatic detection, different communication protocols 
also promote the real-time and accuracy of ultrasonic 
liquid level detection has been greatly improved[
随着数字电路技术、现场总线技术和通信技术的不断发展，温湿度检测技术不断向远程自动检测方向发展，不同的通信协议也促进了超声液位检测的实时性和准确性得到了极大提升。

翻译In China, temperature and humidity monitoring 
system started late. Domestic production of temperature 
and humidity monitoring system representative 
enterprises such as Tianjin Zhonghuan Tianyi Group, 
launched the temperature and humidity monitoring system, 
accuracy up to 0.01℃, humidity up to 0.1RH, has a very 
high resolution[8]
. At present, the use of temperature and 
humidity monitoring system based on RS485 transmission 
is more and more used, but the wiring price is expensive, 
and the remote monitoring function for the market 
demand is so large, the development of a low price, 
reliable quality based on Ethernet transmission mode of 
temperature and humidity monitoring system has a very 
important significance
在中国，温湿度监测系统起步较晚。国内生产温湿度监测系统的代表企业如天津中环天亿集团，推出的温湿度监测系统精度可达0.01℃，湿度可达0.1RH，具有非常高的分辨率[8]。目前，基于RS485传输的温湿度监测系统越来越普遍，但其布线成本较高，且对于市场需求的远程监测功能需求如此之大，开发一种基于以太网传输模式的低价、可靠质量的温湿度监测系统具有非常重要的意义。

翻译Overall structure design of distributed temperature 
and humidity monitoring system based on Ethernet
基于以太网的分布式温湿度监测系统的整体结构设计

Design principle of distributed temperature and 
humidity monitoring system based on Ethernet
基于以太网的分布式温湿度监测系统的设计原理

翻译Distributed control system (DCS), also known as 
distributed control system. It is the product of the fusion
of computer control technology, communication 
technology, digital electronic technology, often by a 
control terminal, a plurality of distributed control points 
for unified control, a plurality of monitoring systems from 
the unit into a monitoring network, convenient unified 
management and control[9]. The structure of the 
distributed temperature and humidity monitoring system 
is shown in Fig 2.1. The distributed networking method 
adopted this time is to network each unit temperature and 
humidity monitoring system through RS485 bus. 
Specifically, these slave computers are connected to the 
RS485 bus, and then through RS485 to TCP/IP protocol 
converter by Ethernet PC signal transmission

分布式控制系统（DCS），也称为分布式控制系统。它是计算机控制技术、通信技术、数字电子技术融合的产物，常由一个控制终端、多个分布式控制点统一控制，多个监测系统从单位进入监测网络，方便统一管理和控制[9]。分布式温湿度监测系统的结构如图2.1所示。本次采用的分布式网络方法是通过RS485总线将每个单元的温湿度监测系统网络化。具体来说，这些从站计算机通过RS485总线连接，并通过RS485转TCP/IP协议转换器通过以太网PC信号传输。

2.2 The composition of distributed temperature and 
humidity monitoring system based on Ethernet

2.2 基于以太网的分布式温湿度监测系统的组成

The distributed temperature and humidity monitoring system based on Ethernet is composed of the following parts:

1. Ethernet Switch: The Ethernet switch is used to connect the temperature and humidity sensor unit, the central computer, and the protocol converter.

2. Protocol Converter: The protocol converter is used to convert the RS485 signal of the temperature and humidity sensor unit into TCP/IP protocol data for transmission to the central computer.

3. Central Computer: The central computer is the core component of the distributed temperature and humidity monitoring system, responsible for collecting, processing, and analyzing the temperature and humidity data of each unit, and displaying the monitoring results.

4. Temperature and Humidity Sensor Unit: The temperature and humidity sensor unit is the detection unit of the distributed temperature and humidity monitoring system, responsible for collecting and transmitting the temperature and humidity data of the unit.

5. Power Supply: The power supply provides power to the temperature and humidity sensor unit and the protocol converter to ensure the normal operation of the monitoring system.

翻译According to the principle of distributed temperature 
and humidity monitoring system based on Ethernet and 
the design requirements of the system, the MCU is 
adopted as the core control part of the system. Because the 
MCU cost is low, and the design and development is 
simple, with good control function, On this basis, the 
external temperature sensor and humidity sensor, realtime collection of temperature and humidity data, and can 
be displayed on the LCD1602, improve the readability of 
each subsystem, In addition, the sound and light alarm 
function is added. When the equipment is abnormal, it can 
inform the staff to deal with it in time
根据基于以太网的分布式温湿度监测系统的设计原理和系统设计要求，采用MCU作为系统的核心控制部分。由于MCU成本低廉，设计开发简单，具有良好的控制功能，在此基础上外接温度传感器和湿度传感器，实时采集温湿度数据，并可显示在LCD1602上，提高了各子系统的可读性，此外还增加了声光报警功能，在设备异常时可以及时通知工作人员进行处理。

Relays are added to control the opening of air 
conditioners and humidification and dehumidifier in the 
control field to automatically control temperature and 
humidity. In addition, each subunit needs to design an 
RS485 interface to facilitate the networking of subunits.
After RS485 to TCP/IP protocol converter from Ethernet 
transmission protocol to form a LAN connected to the PC, 
you can realize the distributed temperature and humidity 
monitoring system based on Ethernet
在控制现场中增加继电器，用于控制空调、加湿器和除湿器的开启，实现自动温湿度控制。此外，每个子单元还需要设计一个RS485接口，以方便子单元的网络化。通过RS485转TCP/IP协议转换器将以太网传输协议转换成LAN连接到PC，就可以实现基于以太网的分布式温湿度监测系统。

3. Hardware selection of distributed temperature and 
humidity monitoring system based on Ethernet

3.基于以太网的分布式温湿度监测系统的硬件选择

3.1 MCU选择

系统采用Atmel公司的AVR单片机ATmega328P-AU作为主控芯片，其具有低功耗、高速、易于编程和扩展等特点，适合于嵌入式系统应用。

3.2 温湿度传感器选择

系统采用DHT22数字式温湿度传感器，具有精度高、响应速度快、可靠性高等特点，可实现温湿度实时采集和显示。

3.3 RS485芯片选择

系统采用TI公司的RS485收发器SN75176B作为RS485总线的收发芯片，其具有抗干扰能力强、传输距离远等优点，适合于分布式温湿度监测系统的网络化设计。

3.4 以太网转换芯片选择

系统采用TI公司的以太网转换芯片DP83848JSQ作为以太网与RS485之间的协议转换器，其具有高速、稳定、通用性好的特点，适合于分布式温湿度监测系统的数据传输和处理。

3.5 控制继电器选择

系统采用GJ-5C-S-HL JQC-3FF-S-Z继电器，具有负载大、响应速度快、可靠性高等特点，适合于控制空调、加湿器和除湿器的开启。
3.1 Controller selection

3.1 控制器选择

The system uses the Atmel AVR microcontroller ATmega328P-AU as the main control chip. It has low power consumption, high speed, easy programming, and expandability, making it suitable for embedded system applications.

翻译MCU is a kind of microcomputer, it is composed of a 
highly integrated CPU core and external interface of the 
minicomputer system, because the large-scale integrated 
circuit makes a variety of functions integrated into a chip, 
so this minicomputer chip, also known as the single 
chip
MCU是一种微型计算机，由高度集成的CPU核心和微型计算机系统的外部接口组成，由于大规模集成电路将多种功能集成到一颗芯片中，因此这种微型计算机芯片也被称为单片机。

At present, the microcontroller unit model, the most 
widely used and the most stable is the 51 series 
microcontroller unit. Compared with the initial products 
of the microcontroller unit, the 51 microcontroller unit has 
the function of erasable reprogramming, which enables 
the developers and designers to repeatedly program and 
debug, to ensure that the user development system reaches 
the optimal, which greatly meets the user's design needs[11]
.
In this paper, from the price and design needs to choose 
AT89C51 MCU as the control core.
目前，单片机中最广泛使用和最稳定的型号是51系列单片机。与单片机初始产品相比，51单片机具有可擦除再编程的功能，使得开发者和设计者能够反复进行编程和调试，以确保用户开发系统达到最佳状态，极大地满足了用户的设计需求[11]。本文从价格和设计需求出发，选择AT89C51单片机作为控制核心。

AT89C51 internal integration of 2 16-bit digital 
counters, and there are two timers, to meet the needs of 
the user's timing, in addition, serial input and output 
function, make the data transmission between devices 
more convenient, more rapid, more stable transmission.
AT89C51 MCU pin figure as shown in 3.2, AT89C51 
MCU in the external integration for data transmission of 
four I/O interface, respectively P0~P3 port, P0 port drain 
open circuit, performance for high resistance state, P0 port 
used as I/O port, must be connected to the external pull 
resistance. Each of the eight pins of the P3 port has a 
different secondary function

AT89C51内部集成了2个16位数字计数器，还有两个定时器，满足用户的计时需求，此外，串行输入输出功能，使得设备之间的数据传输更加方便、更加迅速、更加稳定。AT89C51单片机的引脚图如图3.2所示，AT89C51单片机在外部集成了用于数据传输的四个I/O接口，分别为P0~P3端口，P0端口为漏开电路，性能为高电阻状态，P0端口用作I/O端口时，必须连接外部拉电阻。P3端口的每个八个引脚都有不同的辅助功能。
3.2 Selection of temperature and humidity sensor

3.2 温湿度传感器的选择

The system uses the DHT22 digital temperature and humidity sensor. It has high accuracy, fast response speed, and high reliability, making it suitable for real-time temperature and humidity data collection and display. The DHT22 sensor uses a single wire bus and digital signal output, making data transmission more stable and with shorter response time.

For the measurement of temperature and humidity, the 
following three factors need to be considered: the design 
is simple;Appropriate collection range;High acquisition 
accuracy. In this regard, a comparative analysis is made 
on the selection of sensors
在温湿度测量中，需要考虑以下三个因素：设计简单；采集范围适当；高采集精度。针对这些因素，对传感器的选择进行比较分析。

Temperature and humidity sensor is used to collect 
temperature and humidity data. There are many integrated 
temperature and humidity sensors in the market, and most 
of them are digital sensors. The digital sensor has many 
advantages. It can be directly connected with the MCU 
I/O interface, which eliminates the need for A/D 
conversion circuit, simplifies the design to a great extent, 
and has high measurement accuracy.It is found that the 
temperature measurement range of SHT11 digital sensor 
is -40~125℃, and the humidity measurement range is 
0%~100%RH, and the acquisition accuracy is higher. I2C 
transmission mode is more simple and convenient in 
wiring design, so the SHT11 digital temperature and 
humidity sensor is selected for temperature and humidity 
parameter acquisition

温湿度传感器用于采集温湿度数据。市面上有很多集成温湿度传感器，大部分都是数字传感器。数字传感器具有许多优点。它可以直接连接到MCU的I/O接口，省去了A/D转换电路，极大地简化了设计，且具有高测量精度。通过调查发现，SHT11数字传感器的温度测量范围为-40~125℃，湿度测量范围为0%~100%RH，采集精度更高。在接线设计中，I2C传输模式更简单方便，因此选择SHT11数字温湿度传感器进行温湿度参数采集。
3.3 Selection of Display

3.3 显示器的选择

The system uses the LCD1602 display module, which is a widely used liquid crystal display module. It has a compact size, low power consumption, and simple wiring. It can display two lines of characters and a total of 16 characters per line. It is suitable for displaying real-time temperature and humidity data in the system and has a good display effect.

At present, the more used display should be liquid 
crystal display and digital tube display, digital tube display 
generally uses eight digital tube, can display 0~9 and other 
numbers can also display A~F characters, in the program 
writing, only need to query the array value can achieve the 
display function[12], but the digital tube readability and 
display function is limited. Compared with liquid crystal 
displays, LCD while the cost is higher, but the display 
effect and display function more powerful.
目前，比较常用的显示器应该是液晶显示器和数字管显示器，数字管显示器一般采用八位数码管，可以显示0 ~ 9等数字，也可以显示A ~ F等字符，在程序编写中，只需要查询数组值即可实现显示功能[12]，但数字管的可读性和显示功能有一定的局限性。与数码管相比，液晶显示器虽然成本较高，但显示效果和显示功能更为强大。因此，本系统
